behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction mentions server.url, Bun.serve, and the requirement that the fix be a pure insertion preventing null deref after DOMURL creation; tests check BunString.cpp structure which is the natural location, and pure-insertion requirement is explicit.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug behavior and the conceptual requirement (guard between DOMURL creation and subsequent use) without naming RETURN_IF_EXCEPTION or the exact file/line.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept either RETURN_IF_EXCEPTION(throwScope, {}) or if-check with return, allowing multiple valid guard idioms.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests only parse source text with regex (re.search for guard patterns, git diff inspection) rather than executing the Bun binary to verify server.url throws instead of crashing; the rubric asks to FAIL if every test is text inspection without execution.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub cannot pass: test_fix_adds_control_flow_guard requires a proper JSC guard idiom between toJSNewlyCreated and jsCast in the actual source.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Requirements 2 (pure insertion) and 3 (control-flow guard before jsCast) are tested; requirement 1 (JS exception) is verified indirectly via the guard structure.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment banners (fail_to_pass pr_diff, pass_to_pass pr_diff, pass_to_pass static) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a C++ code fix, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (BunString.cpp, BunString__toJSDOMURL, toJSNewlyCreated, jsCast) match consistently.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction does not name the specific file (BunString.cpp) or line; only describes the symptom and required fix behavior.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
